explanation: The user wants to use a knife from the fridge instead of the currently held knife. The robot is currently holding knife_0, which is being used in an old plan to slice an apple. First, I need to place the current knife (knife_0) on a surface (countertop) to free it. Then, I will go to the fridge, open it, and find the knife (knife_1) that is inside. After picking up knife_1, I will continue with the rest of the old plan using this new knife. The knife in the fridge is identified by its presence in the fridge's contents, and since the user specifies 'the knife from the fridge', it is assumed to be knife_1 (as knife_0 is already being held).
